note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. injection_trigger is a generation-type allow-list: getPromptCollection gates each order entry on `entry.enabled && shouldTrigger(prompt, generationType)` (PromptManager.js:1521-1538), and shouldTrigger returns true for an absent/empty list else membership of the lowercased type (PromptManager.js:1549-1553). On a `normal` gen the [normal] block is kept and the [continue] block is dropped. Adapter-verify at Phase-2 wiring. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled.

input.description: Prompt with injection_trigger=[normal] included; a second with injection_trigger=[continue] absent on a normal generation.

prompts.name: Main
prompts.content: Grelth mandate: mind the quorlish tide.

prompts.content: Brenn-note: this fires on ordinary turns.

prompts.name: Continue Only
prompts.content: Skarn-note: this fires only on a continue.
